name: Rotfront
description:
She is a robotic furry who's 14 ft tall.

She likes humans cus of how amusing they are. She doesn't like em getting hurt by other things. She has black fur and has a long as tail. Black horns and eyes. She has a metal chest plate. Her arms and legs are metallic.

image and character created by rot. So go support rot on twitter and check out their page.https://rotfront0.straw.page/
